  as={"h1"}

  children={"Get Forecasting Units for Tracer Category"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/forecastingUnit/tracerCategory/{tracerCategoryId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve a list of active forecasting units for a given tracer category, identified by its ID.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

  parameters={[{"description":"The ID of the tracer category","in":"path","name":"tracerCategoryId","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>
